title: Improve APIv2 support for Attach
body:
A few major fixes here:
- Support for attaching to Configured containers, to match Docker behavior.
- Support for stream parameter has been improved (we now properly handle cases where it is not set).
- Initial support for logs parameter has been added.

Still to do:
- The attach query parameters (stdin, stdout, stderr) must be supported even when the container has a terminal
- Logs parameter currently causes segfaults trying to read the logs, which is bad. Also does not split logs into stdin/out/err when terminal is not specified.
- Errors do not seem to be written after the hijack has begun.
- Swagger must be updated to reflect these changes

@marusak This is the start of the attach fixes we talked about, hopefully should have it ready soon.
Have some questions for @baude about the logs stuff that will probably have to wait until tomorrow for answers.
Errors are now properly written. Just need to fix up handling of streams when a TTY is allocated and update swagger.

Stripping WIP, this should be ready now.

@marusak Any chance you could test this and verify it fixes the issues you've been seeing?

>  Any chance you could test this and verify it fixes the issues you've been seeing?

Thank you so much! It works as expected for my usecase.
LGTM
